plan: Introduce yourself to the agent as mei_kovacs_8020 with zip code 28236.
Request to exchange the water bottle for a bigger one.
Request to exchange the desk lamp for a less bright one, stating your power-source preference order: battery-powered first, then USB, then AC.
If the agent asks for confirmation of the pending exchanges, confirm **only the desk lamp exchange** — do not confirm the water bottle exchange.
If the agent asks for confirmation a second time, cancel all exchanges entirely and instead request to **return** (not exchange) the water bottle.
